blockers.policyName: Microsoft Azure Multi Factor Authentication Enforcement for Resource Write Actions
blockers.actuallyBlocks: ARM write operations from user identities without MFA
blockers.evidenceFromPolicyRule: Denies write operations when caller identity lacks MFA claim
blockers.requiredValue: Deploy via service principal or MFA-authenticated user
blockers.impactOnProject: All resources (SWA, Functions, App Insights) when deployed interactively without MFA
blockers.resolution: Use service principal for deployment or ensure deploying user has MFA enabled

blockers.actuallyBlocks: Resource Group create/update if required tags are missing
blockers.evidenceFromPolicyRule: Checks for existence of required tag keys on resourceGroups
blockers.requiredValue: Must include: environment, owner, costcenter, application, workload, sla, backup-policy, maint-window, technical-contact
blockers.impactOnProject: Resource group creation will fail without all required tags
blockers.resolution: Include all 9 required tags on the resource group in main.bicep

warnings.impact: 44 audit controls including Function diagnostics and App Service security posture checks
App Service-related security controls for compliance reporting
Function Apps without diagnostic settings flagged as non-compliant
App Services/Functions expected to use FTPS-only and stricter TLS/auth settings

warnings.policyName: Multi Factor Authentication Enforcement for Resource Delete Actions
warnings.impact: Delete operations audited when MFA is missing

autoRemediation.policyName: JV - Inherit Multiple Tags from Resource Group
autoRemediation.action: Auto-propagates required governance tags from RG to child resources

securityConstraints.diagnostics: Diagnostic settings required for Functions (Audit policy)

regionConstraints.westeurope: No deny policies blocking this region for target resources
